§6High-Performance Solvent§f

§aCorrosive, radioactive solvent for bedrock ore processing and fullerene production — the pinnacle of solvent technology!§f

High-Performance Solvent (HPS) is a corrosive, flammable, radioactive liquid produced from §bReformate Gas§f and §bChlorine Gas§f in the §bIndustrial Mixer§f. It is essential for full §bBedrock Ore§f processing and §bFullerene Solution§f production, and requires §bHazardous Material Tanks§f for storage.

§6Production§f:
§b• Industrial Mixer§f: §e750mB§f Reformate Gas + §e250mB§f Chlorine Gas → §e1,000mB§f HPS.
§b• RBMK Irradiation Channel§f: Chlorinated Petroleum Wax → §e100mB§f HPS.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f: Dissolved Egg → §e50mB§f HPS + §e50mB§f Cholesterol Solution.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Bedrock Ore Processing§f (Ore Acidizer): §e250mB§f HPS for cleaning primary fractions.
§b• Fullerene Solution§f (Industrial Mixer): §e500mB§f HPS + Fine Soot → §e250mB§f Fullerene Solution.
§b• Dissolved Egg§f (Industrial Mixer): §e500mB§f HPS + Egg → §e1,000mB§f Dissolved Egg.
§b• Cadmium / Arsenic Extraction§f: Ore Acidizer with HPS to extract nuggets from plants/scraps.

§eTip§f: HPS is dangerous — it is radioactive, corrosive, and flammable. Always store it in §bHazardous Material Tanks§f, never standard fluid tanks! However, it enables access to §bfullerene§f, which is critical for late-game machines like the Pyrolysis Oven and advanced components.
